description: A high-energy astrophysicist needs to correlate the optical filamentary structure of three historical supernova remnants with their thermal dust and high-energy signatures. Following the observing plan at ~/Documents/snr_research_plan.txt, capture at least 3 H-alpha (slot 5) and 3 OIII (slot 6) 60-second exposures for each specified target in their respective <Target>/optical/ directories. Generate 0.5-degree FOV sky survey maps named 'thermal_dust.png' (heat palette) and 'high_energy.png' (cool palette) in each <Target>/survey/ directory. Document the findings in a summary report at ~/Documents/snr_correlation_report.txt.
